EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSET, ALEXANDER P DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-09-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING REGARDING PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, ORDER FOR THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF MATTERS ASSERTED. THERE APPEARS TO BE NO OPPOSITION FILED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT; ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL ISSUE THE FOLLOWING ORDER; (1) DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL FILE NO LATER THAT 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO EACH INTERROGATORY SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; (2) DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL PRODUCE NO LATER THAN 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER ALL DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR INSPECTION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; (3) DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL PROVIDE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION. TO THE EXTENT THAT HE FAILS TO DO SO THE GENUINESS OF THE DOCUMENTS AND THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS ASSERTED IN THE REQUEST WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM OFFERING AT TRIAL ANY EVIDENCE SEEN TO CONTRADICT SUCH ADMISSIONS. (4) PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT AND HIS COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER (APPROVED BY OPPOSING COUNSEL AS TO FORM AND CONTENT) TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Set For Trial On May-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: no appearances.

parties are deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

the court adopts its tentative ruling regarding PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted. THERE APPEARS TO BE NO OPPOSITION FILED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT; ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL ISSUE THE FOLLOWING ORDER; (1) DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL FILE NO LATER THAT 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO EACH INTERROGATORY SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; (2) DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL PRODUCE NO LATER THAN 15 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER ALL DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR INSPECTION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; (3) DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL PROVIDE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION. TO THE EXTENT THAT HE FAILS TO DO SO THE GENUINESS OF THE DOCUMENTS AND THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS ASSERTED IN THE REQUEST WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM OFFERING AT TRIAL ANY EVIDENCE SEEN TO CONTRADICT SUCH ADMISSIONS. (4) PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT ALEXANDER P. ROSSETT AND HIS COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER (APPROVED BY OPPOSING COUNSEL AS TO FORM AND CONTENT) TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
